title: Timeout Runbook
steps: Check network connectivity between affected services
Inspect application and gateway logs for repeated timeout patterns
Escalate to platform operations if issue persists

title: Authentication Failure Runbook
steps: Check recent credential or token changes
Inspect authentication logs for error details

title: Data Delay Runbook
steps: Inspect queue backlog and processing latency
Validate timestamp freshness of upstream data
Notify data operations team if delay exceeds SLA threshold
